title: oncidium kegeljanii
intro: Oncidium kegeljanii, also known as Kegel's Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Ecuador and Peru. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Oncidium kegeljanii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
